is.t: Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics; gateway to Engineering, Architecture and Pure Sciences
Physics, Chemistry, Biology; gateway to Medical, Pharmacy, Nursing and Life Sciences
All four core science subjects; maximum flexibility for both engineering and medical UG options
Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics; pathway to B.Com, BBA, CA, CS and finance careers
History, Civics, Economics, Language subjects; pathway to BA, Law, Journalism and Social Sciences
Academic studies combined with a vocational subject (IT, Electronics, Agriculture) for early employability
Structures, construction materials, surveying and site management; lateral entry to B.Tech available
Machine design, thermodynamics, manufacturing processes; widely applicable across industries
Circuits, power systems, electrical machines; leads to roles in power sector and manufacturing
Electronics, communication systems, embedded systems; telecom and consumer electronics industries
Programming, networking, databases; fastest path to IT jobs or lateral B.Tech entry
Vehicle systems, engines, automotive electronics; auto manufacturing and service sector
Software, networking, web development; lateral entry to B.Tech IT available
Dispensing of medicines and pharmaceutical sciences; eligible to work in retail and hospital pharmacies
Architectural drawing, building design basics, construction documents; assists architects and engineers
Chemical processes, plant operations, safety; chemical and pharmaceutical industries
Fibre science, fabric manufacturing, textile machinery; textile mills and garment export industry
Electrical wiring, panel installation and maintenance; highly demanded in construction and manufacturing
Assembly, fitting and maintenance of mechanical components; core trade in engineering workshops
Arc, gas, TIG and MIG welding techniques; essential in construction, shipbuilding and fabrication
Lathe machine operation, precision turning of metal components; for manufacturing industries
Computer basics, office applications, data entry; entry-level IT and government sector roles
Pipefitting, sanitation systems, water supply; construction and infrastructure sector
Installation and maintenance of refrigerators and ACs; growing demand in urban India
Automobile diagnosis and repair; roles in workshops, garages and auto dealerships
Diesel engine maintenance and repair; transport, railways and heavy machinery sectors
Technical drawing, CAD basics, construction drawings; assist civil engineers and architects
Wiring, earthing, electrical safety for buildings and factories; construction sector demand
Shorthand writing, typing and office skills; judiciary, government and corporate sector jobs
MS Office, internet browsing, email; NIELIT-certified; basic requirement for many government jobs
Certificate in Tally & Accounting (Tally ERP / Prime)
GST filing, bookkeeping, payroll using Tally; essential skill for commerce and accounting jobs
Visual design, logo creation, print media; creative jobs in advertising and media
Pattern making, stitching and basic garment construction; boutique and fashion career
Haircare, skincare, makeup, salon management; beauty industry career
Kitchen operations, food service, hospitality basics; hotel and restaurant industry
DSLR/mirrorless photography, editing, lighting; freelance and media career
Certificate in Spoken English & Personality Development
Communication skills, grammar, pronunciation; essential soft skill for any career

JEE Main, JEE Advanced, AP/TS EAMCET, MHT CET, KCET, KEAM, WBJEE, BITSAT
Five-year professional degree in architectural design, urban planning and construction technology
Urban and regional planning, land use and infrastructure policy; offered at NITs and planning schools
Diploma Lateral Entry to B.Tech (2nd Year)
Direct admission to 2nd year B.Tech for Polytechnic diploma holders; saves one year
ECET (AP/TS), LEET (Punjab), State lateral entry exams
Foundation medical degree for becoming a qualified allopathic doctor; one of the most competitive programs in India
Dental surgeon degree; diagnosis and treatment of dental and oral diseases
Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery; classical Indian medicine system
Bachelor of Homoeopathic Medicine and Surgery; alternative medicine practice
Bachelor of Unani Medicine and Surgery; traditional Greco-Arabic medicine system

Clinical pharmacy doctoral-level program; patient care and drug therapy management
Professional nursing degree; critical care, community health, midwifery; direct patient care career
Diploma-level nursing program; widely accepted in government and private hospitals
Basic nursing; community health worker; maternal and child healthcare roles
Physical rehabilitation, sports medicine, musculoskeletal therapy; growing healthcare career
IPU CET, MH CET, State Physiotherapy Entrance
Short-duration pharmacy diploma; can work in retail or hospital pharmacy; eligible to own a pharmacy shop
Core commerce degree covering accounting, finance, taxation, auditing and business law
Specialized commerce degree with greater academic depth; preferred for CA, CPA and research pursuits
CUET / DU Cut-off / State University Entrance
Business management fundamentals; marketing, HR, operations; popular gateway to MBA
Combined UG + PG management program; saves time; IIM Indore, Symbiosis, NMIMS
ICAI's CA program; India's top professional accounting qualification; highly valued in finance careers
ICSI program; corporate governance, compliance, secretarial practice; niche and valuable qualification
ICMAI program; cost accounting, financial analysis, management accounting; industry-valued certification
Core pure science degree; foundation for research, competitive exams (UPSC, GATE) and PG studies
Life sciences at molecular and cellular level; research and pharmaceutical industry careers
Programming, algorithms, OS, databases; alternative to B.Tech CSE
Software development, networking, IT applications; popular gateway to MCA or IT industry
Data analysis, machine learning foundations, statistical modelling; career in analytics and data science
Combined BSc + MSc program offered by IITs via JAM; for science enthusiasts aiming for research
IIT JAM, IISER Aptitude Test, CUCET

Commerce and law; well-suited for taxation law, banking law and corporate compliance roles

Tourism industry, event management, travel trade; growing sector driven by domestic and international tourism

Short-term defence service for youth; subsequent civilian skills certification; Army, Navy and Air Force open entry

Biomedical research post in ICMR institutes; epidemiology, clinical research, disease surveillance
Advanced agricultural research at national institutes; crop improvement, soil health, food security
Prestigious government fellowship for young researchers; INR 55,000/month stipend; open to all disciplines
Prestigious government-sponsored research collaboration between India and USA; open to all disciplines
Teaching and research career at degree colleges or universities; requires UGC-NET/SET qualification and PhD
UGC-NET (NTA NET), State SET, University Recruitment
Senior faculty position; based on promotions through CAS (Career Advancement Scheme); significant research publication required
Permanent Scientist Grade posts in central government research organizations; high job security and research independence
CSIR / ICAR / ICMR Direct Recruitment through GATE or Interview
Defence and space research; DRDO (defence technology), ISRO (space), BARC (nuclear); prestigious and well-paid
DRDO CEPTAM, ISRO ICRB, GATE-based + Interview
Senior academic leadership; management of educational operations; typically requires M.Ed / PhD + experience
Through Promotions / University / State Government Recruitment
UPSC Civil Services (IAS / IPS / IFS / IRS etc.)
India's most prestigious career path; 20+ central services; eligibility open to all graduates and PG holders
Deputy Collector, DSP and other State Administrative/Police Services; each state has its own PSC exam
State PSC Exam (APPSC, TSPSC, MPSC, UPPSC etc.)
Banking Services (IBPS PO / SBI PO / RBI Grade B)
Probationary Officer in public sector banks; RBI Grade B is the most prestigious banking services post
IBPS PO/SO, SBI PO, RBI Grade B Written Test + Interview
Assistant Section Officer, Income Tax Inspector, Auditor and other Group B & C central government posts
SSC CGL Written Exam + Skill Test
GATE (PSU Jobs or Higher Studies Abroad)
Gateway to PSU employment (ONGC, NTPC, BHEL, GAIL) or master's admissions in Germany, Singapore, NUS
GATE Exam (CS, ME, CE, EC, EE, BT, CH etc.)
National Eligibility Test for Assistant Professor and Junior Research Fellowship; required for teaching in universities
Commissioned officer in Army, Navy or Air Force through Short Service Commission for PG holders
Agricultural and rural development banking; NABARD Grade A is prestigious for agriculture and rural finance career
CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) Levels I, II, III
Globally recognized investment management qualification; investment banking, fund management and equity research
FRM (Financial Risk Manager) Parts I & II
Risk management certification by GARP; credit risk, market risk and operational risk roles in banks and finance firms
Highest ICAI qualification; Partner in CA firms, CFO and finance leadership in any corporate sector
Super-specialty clinical training beyond MCh/DM; offered by NMC, professional bodies and leading hospitals
PMI global certification; project leadership in IT, construction, pharma and any project-based industry

Online AWS / Azure / GCP Certification Exams
Advanced information security qualifications; roles in cyber defence, SOC analyst, security architect
Data Science / ML Certifications (Google / Coursera / IBM)
Industry-recognized data science credentials; add-on to academic PG for analytics and AI careers
SEO, SEM, content marketing, social media advertising; marketing and brand management roles
Building and scaling one's own business; supported by T-Hub (Hyderabad), iCreate, IIM incubators and SIDBI SPEED fund
No formal exam; accelerator / incubator applications
Senior technical or functional expert role in a corporation; requires deep subject knowledge and 5-10 years' experience
Strategy advisory at McKinsey, BCG, Bain, Deloitte or Big Four; top-tier MBA or PhD + relevant experience
Policy research, market research, technology advisory on a project basis; growing gig economy opportunity
Social impact, community development, international development; TISS, IRMA and development sector degrees help
MS / PhD Abroad (USA / UK / Canada / Australia / Germany)
World-class research and teaching universities; TA/RA funding available; GRE/IELTS required for most countries
MBA at International B-Schools (INSEAD / LBS / HBS)
Global MBA at top-ranked global institutes; international career access; typically 3-5 years work experience required
GMAT / GRE + Work Experience + Essays + Interview
Funded research stay in Germany; DAAD is India's largest scholarship source for Germany; all disciplines
Fully funded Master's in European university consortium; highly competitive; all disciplines
Prestigious India-US government funded fellowship; Master's, PhD, research and teaching opportunities
